Text.SourceString: A measure of how well rested you are. As you get more tired your stamina, carrying capacity and even your spellcasting will suffer.
Text.LocalizedString: A measure of how well rested you are. As you get more tired your stamina, carrying capacity and even your spellcasting will suffer.

Text.SourceString: Hydration affects stamina regeneration. The higher it is, the better your stamina recovers.
Text.LocalizedString: Hydration affects stamina regeneration. The higher it is, the better your stamina recovers.

Text.SourceString: Sustenance affects health regeneration. The higher it is, the better your health regenerates.
Text.LocalizedString: Sustenance affects health regeneration. The higher it is, the better your health regenerates.
